userSettings.title: User Settings
userSettings.description: User's Canvas LMS configuration and notification preferences.

userId.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the user.

canvasUrl.description: The base URL of the user's Canvas LMS instance.

apiToken.description: The personal access token for the Canvas API.

notificationThresholds.description: Hours before deadline to send notifications (e.g., [24, 1]).

assignments.title: Tracked Assignments
assignments.description: Cache of assignments and their notification status.

userId.description: The owner of this assignment record.

notifiedThresholds.description: List of thresholds (hours) already notified for this assignment.

/users/{userId}/settings/current.description: The current settings for a specific user.

/users/{userId}/assignments/{assignmentI.description: Tracked assignments for a specific user.
